name: Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar well.
2. Add the beaten yolks.
3. Mix in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Combine all fruits and nuts with some of the flour, then beat well.
5. Add the nuts and brandy to the mixture.
6. Bake slowly.
7. (Optional) For half the recipe, add a small teaspoon of soda.
